# claude-email

> Email-driven wrapper for the Claude Code CLI with an integrated MCP chat relay for managing multiple Claude Code agents.

## Overview

claude-email polls an IMAP mailbox for authorized commands, executes them via `claude --print`, and replies via SMTP. It includes a full MCP-based chat system where claude-email acts as the user's avatar, brokering conversations between the user (via email) and multiple Claude Code agents (via MCP tools).

## Key Features

- Email as universal remote control for Claude Code CLI
- Dual authentication: GPG signatures or shared secret in Subject
- Multi-agent chat relay via MCP SSE server
- Spawn, message, and manage Claude Code agents from any email client
- User-level systemd services (no sudo required)
- SQLite with WAL mode for safe concurrent access
- 204 tests with 99% code coverage

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/cocodedk/claude-email
